days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Mist at first. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers. Possible thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 northerly winds, becoming easterlies.
